name: Fettuccine Alfredo#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add garlic; sauté 1 minute.
3. Stir in flour.
4. Gradually add milk, stirring with a wire whisk until blended.
5. Cook, stirring constantly, until thickened and bubbly (about 5 minutes).
6. Stir in cream cheese and cook 2 more minutes.
7. Add 1 cup of Parmesan cheese, stirring constantly until it melts.
8. Pour over hot cooked fettuccine; toss well to coat.
9. Top with remaining 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese, fresh parsley, and pepper.
